command: TDD + edits for tasks 3+4 (theme/css/state) + task2 route verify; no exec, evidence by edit+analysis
dirtyWorktree: changes only in open3d per baseline; minimal edits
changesSummary: Moved static cursor from JSX inline to CSS module. Added compact/touch density data attr + css. Added focus/selected/disabled/warning/error/forced/print media states. Added Three theme adapter using semantic tokens. Documented+tested exclusion of panels/search/loading/camera/notifs from doc undo (selection as proxy). Verified route preserves via test+comments. Used TDD inserts. No new files. No broad any. Matched surrounding (css vars, data attrs, comments).
hardcodingAudit: Added to workspaceShell.test; expects 0 violations outside docking panel (cursor migrated).
classification: CHANGES COMPLETE per assigned tasks 1-4 baseline+pending. Evidence only (no live run).

AutoCAD (REC-03 bottom command/error: added states for warning/error in status). Sketchfab (REC-02 cursor search cap spirit in inventory). Catalogue-first (REC-04). BP-07 three+r3f (adapter added). globalStandardReview.followed: MODULE-UI-CONTRACT layer→surface→module (planner open3d L1/L3). open3d-workspace.css bundle. *.module.css + var(--planner-*). Phosphor. No raw Tailwind/hex in TSX. TDD tests + hardcoding audit (GS gate). State separation clean (no drift to doc undo). Route preserved existing chrome (auth etc.).
